mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sub_product WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM party_member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM party WHERE recruit_status = 'RECRUITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM party_cycle WHERE status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING', 'FAILED')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT party_id) FROM party_cycle WHERE status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING', 'FAILED')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE status = 'WAITING'
